# MESkit — Source-Available MES
> Source-available MES with built-in analytics, quality alerts, and natural language queries. Free to self-host. ISA-95 aligned, simulation-first, MQTT-ready.

## What is MESkit
- [What is MESkit? (FAQ)](https://meskit.cloud/faq): Core definitions and product status
- [Why your MES needs a universal tool layer](https://meskit.cloud/blog/what-is-an-ai-native-mes): Architecture explainer

## Product
- [Product](https://meskit.cloud/product): Build, Configure, Run, Monitor modes
- [Docs](https://meskit.cloud/docs): User guides for every mode and feature
- [Monitor Mode](https://meskit.cloud/docs/monitor-mode): Real-time dashboards for throughput, yield, OEE, WIP tracking, and order progress
- [Production Planner](https://meskit.cloud/docs/planner): AI agent for capacity analysis and scheduling using live production data
- [REST API](https://meskit.cloud/docs/rest-api): Auto-generated REST endpoints and Natural Language API with API key auth
- [Smart Features](https://meskit.cloud/agents): Three smart features sharing one typed tool layer
- [ISA-95](https://meskit.cloud/isa-95): Standards alignment and database schema mapping
- [Architecture](https://meskit.cloud/architecture): Four-layer design with tool layer rationale
- [Roadmap](https://meskit.cloud/roadmap): M1-M6 milestone timeline

## Technical
- [How MESkit smart features call MES tools](https://meskit.cloud/blog/how-meskit-agents-call-mes-tools): Tool registration and call chain deep-dive
- [From simulation to MQTT](https://meskit.cloud/blog/from-simulation-to-mqtt-same-tools-different-transport): Transport transition without logic rewrites
- [ISA-95 for developers](https://meskit.cloud/blog/isa-95-for-developers): Practical mapping from standard to Postgres schema

## Key facts
- Category: Source-available MES toolkit with built-in analytics (BSL 1.1 — free to self-host).
- Identity: Source-available MES with production tracking, quality alerts, and natural language queries. Operators stay in command.
- Standards: ISA-95 aligned data model with 15 mapped Postgres tables.
- Tool layer: 26 Zod-validated server actions shared by UI and intelligence layer.
- Smart features: Ask MESkit (natural language queries), Quality Monitor, Production Planner.
- North Star: Predict machine failure and coordinate the response via three automation layers (Monitor, Plan, Act) — operators stay in command.
- Roadmap: 6 milestones. M1–M5 complete (scaffold, Build Mode, Configure Mode, Run Mode + Simulator, Monitor Mode + Planner). M6 (MQTT integration) next.
- Stack: Next.js, Supabase, Claude API (tool-use), TypeScript.
